definition: Checks whether the validation run records run_id input files prompts model parameters timestamps and output schema
formula_or_rule: PASS if all required manifest fields are present and non-empty; otherwise FAIL
pass_condition: PASS only when all required reproducibility fields are present
failure_meaning: Results cannot be treated as reproducible validation evidence
dashboard_use: Display as a validation readiness badge

definition: Ensures all compared methods have outputs for the same task set and schema
formula_or_rule: PASS if task_id set in all result files matches tasks.jsonl exactly
pass_condition: Exact match of task_id sets across all methods
failure_meaning: Comparative claims are invalid due to task mismatch
dashboard_use: Display as a comparison integrity status

definition: Verifies if reported results distinguish between protocol-defined artifact-only and automated-validation states
formula_or_rule: PASS if output metadata strictly maps each row to a defined validation state
input_required: Benchmark summary MD, result metadata fields
failure_meaning: Potential overclaiming or misrepresentation of data status
dashboard_use: Highlight as a safety boundary indicator

definition: Percentage of agent stages with successful execution logs and non-empty trace data
formula_or_rule: (Completed trace steps / Total planned steps) * 100
input_required: D1 agent_traces table or JSON logs
failure_meaning: Execution process is opaque or interrupted

definition: Rate of retrieved papers analyzed by the rule-based or LLM Critic for qualitative risks
formula_or_rule: (Papers with critic flags or analysis / Total retrieved papers) * 100
input_required: D1 critic_flags table or result columns
failure_meaning: Qualitative risk assessment was skipped or failed

definition: Rate of successful conversion of raw agent output to the v2 benchmark schema
formula_or_rule: (Successfully parsed rows / Total candidate rows) * 100
input_required: Raw execution artifacts, v2 schema definition
failure_meaning: Data format is incompatible with automated evaluation

definition: Rate of results containing all required scholarly fields (DOI Title Journal Year)
formula_or_rule: (Rows with all required fields / Total rows) * 100
failure_meaning: Incomplete records hinder verification and ranking

definition: Rate of results with syntactically valid DOI strings (matching standard regex)
formula_or_rule: (Syntactically valid DOIs / Total DOIs) * 100
failure_meaning: malformed identifiers indicate low system precision

definition: Rate of successful automated parsing of complex agent outputs (traces scores report sections)
formula_or_rule: (Successfully parsed JSON blobs / Total JSON blobs) * 100
input_required: D1 trace data, report JSON objects
failure_meaning: System output is too unstable for automated consumption

definition: Rate of discrepancies between LLM-reported metadata and verified API metadata (Crossref)
formula_or_rule: (Mismatched rows / Total verified rows) * 100
failure_meaning: System suffers from low-level data hallucinations

definition: Percentage of DOIs verified as existing in external scholarly databases
formula_or_rule: (API-confirmed DOIs / Total DOIs) * 100
failure_meaning: Fabricated or incorrect identifiers detected

definition: Rate of papers confirmed as real scholarly records through title/author/journal matching
formula_or_rule: (Confirmed records / Total records) * 100
failure_meaning: System produces fake paper recommendations

definition: Rate of retrieved papers correctly matching the project's approved business school journal list
formula_or_rule: (Papers in allowlist / Total retrieved papers) * 100
input_required: Business school journal allowlist, result journal list
failure_meaning: Journal filtering agent is failing

definition: Proportion of retrieved papers restricted to S and A1 tier journals
formula_or_rule: (S/A1 papers / Total retrieved papers) * 100
failure_meaning: Retrieval quality is skewed toward lower-tier journals

definition: Rate of successful Open Access status and PDF URL verification via Unpaywall
formula_or_rule: (Verified OA links / Papers reported as OA) * 100
failure_meaning: System provides broken or invalid OA links

definition: Proportion of retrieved papers matching the gold DOI set in the top 5 results
formula_or_rule: (Gold matches in top 5 / 5) averaged across tasks
failure_meaning: Low quantitative retrieval precision

definition: Ranking quality using Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain based on gold relevance
formula_or_rule: DCG@5 / IDCG@5
failure_meaning: Relevant papers are not ranked effectively

definition: Proportion of the gold set successfully retrieved within the top 20 results
formula_or_rule: (Gold matches found / Total papers in gold set for task)
failure_meaning: System misses key papers from the audited set

definition: Percentage of tasks where at least one gold paper was successfully retrieved
formula_or_rule: (Tasks with >=1 hit / Total tasks) * 100
failure_meaning: System fails to find ground-truth papers for many tasks

definition: Mean Reciprocal Rank of the first relevant gold paper in the results
formula_or_rule: 1 / rank of first gold match averaged across tasks
failure_meaning: Relevant content is buried deep in the rankings

definition: 1-5 semantic relevance score from the fixed v2 automated judge
formula_or_rule: Mean of relevance_score_v2 field from judge JSON
input_required: LLM Judge output logs, fixed prompt v2
failure_meaning: Retrieved abstracts do not semantically match the question

definition: Match rate between task constructs and paper findings as judged by LLM
formula_or_rule: Mean of construct_match field from judge JSON
failure_meaning: Papers match keywords but miss the core research constructs

definition: Alignment with requested level of analysis domain or methodology
formula_or_rule: Mean of context_match and method_domain_match
failure_meaning: Papers are in the right topic but wrong context or method

definition: Self-reported confidence level of the automated LLM judge
formula_or_rule: Mean of confidence field from judge JSON
failure_meaning: Judge output is uncertain and may be unreliable

definition: Automated check for logical consistency between judge reasoning string and numerical score
formula_or_rule: PASS if reasoning length > 100 chars and keyword consistency check passes
failure_meaning: Judge is producing arbitrary scores without valid justification

definition: Rate at which known negative distractors are incorrectly selected or scored as highly relevant
formula_or_rule: (Distractors retrieved or scored >=4 / Total distractors in set) * 100
input_required: Gold Set v2 (negative distractor labels), Result files
failure_meaning: System is prone to surface-level keyword matching errors

definition: Rate of nonexistent fabricated or completely irrelevant papers returned as valid results
formula_or_rule: (Fake DOIs + Nonexistent papers) / Total results * 100
failure_meaning: System trustworthiness is compromised by data fabrication

definition: Percentage of tasks reaching infrastructure time limits (e.g. 4-min Cloudflare limit)
formula_or_rule: (Timed out tasks / Total tasks) * 100
failure_meaning: System is too slow or resource-intensive for the platform

definition: Average time elapsed from task start to completion
formula_or_rule: Sum(completion_time - start_time) / Total tasks
failure_meaning: System efficiency is below user expectations

definition: Estimated resource and API cost per paper discovery task
formula_or_rule: (LLM tokens * price) + (API calls * price proxy)
failure_meaning: System is not economically viable for scale
